promotions.short_detail: Research modules, vendor intel & direct access to Sam.
promotions.full_detail: SammyC's Skool community is now live. Get direct access to Sam, research peptide modules, vendor intel, and community discussion.

promotions.headline: 40% off sitewide, stacks with SAMMYC
promotions.short_detail: Birthday sale, code SAMMYC adds 15%, free 10ml BAC water on orders $100+
promotions.full_detail: Glow Aminos is celebrating their company birthday with 40% off sitewide, stackable with the 15% SAMMYC code. Every qualifying order of $100 or more automatically receives a free 10ml BAC water while supplies last. Confirm final eligibility, stacking rules, and checkout pricing directly on the vendor website.
